suite.name: Mobile Simulation Tests

kw.name: Setup Mobile Simulation Environment
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup mobile simulation environment

test.name: MOBILE_SIM_001_Test Mobile Viewport Simulation

kw.name: Setup Mobile Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Setup browser for mobile simulation

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Window Size
kw.doc: Returns current window width and height as integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Browser
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Cleanup browser after mobile simulation

test.doc: Test mobile viewport simulation using Chrome DevTools

test.name: MOBILE_SIM_003_Test Mobile Touch Simulation

kw.name: Setup Mobile Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Setup browser for mobile simulation

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: // Simulate touch event on search box
var touchEvent = new Event('touchstart', { bubbles: true });
console.log('Touch event simulated on search box');
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'mobile test' into text field '//input[@id='small-searchterms']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Value
kw.doc: Returns the value attribute of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Browser
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Cleanup browser after mobile simulation

test.doc: Test mobile touch simulation using JavaScript

kw.name: Setup Mobile Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Setup browser for mobile simulation

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: value: 'Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 15_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/15.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1',
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: ${user_agent} = Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 15_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/15.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Simulated user agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 15_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/15.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Browser
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Cleanup browser after mobile simulation

kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

test.doc: Test mobile CSS media queries and responsive design

test.name: MOBILE_SIM_006_Test Mobile Performance Simulation

kw.name: Setup Mobile Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Setup browser for mobile simulation

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'performance test' into text field '//input[@id='small-searchterms']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'performance test' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'performance test' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Performance test should complete within 10 seconds
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Browser
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Cleanup browser after mobile simulation

test.status: Text 'performance test' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Setup Mobile Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Setup browser for mobile simulation

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key TAB to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Browser
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Cleanup browser after mobile simulation

test.name: MOBILE_SIM_008_Test Mobile Gesture Simulation

kw.name: Setup Mobile Browser
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Setup browser for mobile simulation

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: function simulateSwipe(startX, startY, endX, endY, duration) {
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Get Window Size
kw.doc: Returns current window width and height as integers.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.msg: TypeError: Expected argument 1 to be a dictionary, got tuple instead.
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.
kw.status: TypeError: Expected argument 1 to be a dictionary, got tuple instead.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Browser
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Cleanup browser after mobile simulation

test.doc: Test mobile gesture simulation using JavaScript
test.status: TypeError: Expected argument 1 to be a dictionary, got tuple instead.

kw.name: Teardown Mobile Simulation Environment
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup mobile simulation environment

suite.doc: Mobile Simulation Tests for SDET Technical Exercise Demonstrates mobile testing concepts using Chrome DevTools Simulates mobile behavior without requiring Appium server
